title: Botanic Magic
description: A Minecraft mod made for Modfest 26 that adds mystical flowers that can be extracted to do magic
body:
![Made for Modfest 26](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19adb243ff6ef0aafea766fb8765f4c5da9ec956.png)
# Botanic Magic
A Magic mod based on flowers | Made for Modfest26

## Flowers
There are many types of flowers, resulting in differing spells via researching them
- Pyrotunia - A Fire flower found in the Savanna
- Glaciolus - An Ice flower found in the Tagia and the Mountain
- Sparkspur - An Electric flower found in the Plains (near villages)
- Begoneya - A Wind flower found anywhere in the overworld
- Terrow - A Earth flower found in the Jungle
- Holyhock - A Light flower found in the Mountain
- Abyssum - A Dark flower found in the Swamp

## Spells
Each flower's element has a set of magical abilities
- Projectile
- AOE
- Cone
- Collum
- Buff Self

## Floral Enchantopedia
Is the textbook given to the player when crafting a flower with a book that tells you the odds for how the flower extraction process works

### Explore the magical world with botany and have a fun PVP fight with friends
